sections.title: ⚔️ Attack on Titan
sections.content:
🚨 FOUR DAYS UNTIL ANIMEJAPAN — and Attack on Titan fans are on HIGH ALERT! AnimeJapan 2026 kicks off THIS SATURDAY (March 28-29) at Tokyo Big Sight, and the entire AOT fandom is holding its breath waiting for a surprise reveal. Whether it's a new OVA, a remaster, a side story we've never seen, or something nobody has even guessed yet — if any announcement is coming, it's coming THIS WEEKEND. Set your alarms and keep your eyes on every AOT social account starting Saturday morning. The quiet before this storm is absolutely electric. ⚡

While we wait, the Attack on Titan × Nijigen no Mori collaboration experience on Awaji Island, Japan is fully open and the footage fans are posting is absolutely WILD. This is a real-life nighttime immersive experience where you literally walk through Titan territory after dark — massive installations of real Titans, dramatic lighting, reconstructed scenes from inside the walls, and an atmosphere so intense that people on social media are genuinely sprinting and screaming. Plus you can grab exclusive on-site merch featuring newly illustrated art of Eren, Mikasa, Levi, and Erwin on can badges, acrylic stands, and more. It runs until December 13th, 2026 — so there's still time to dream!

On the merchandise front — a HUGE new deal just dropped. JAKKS Pacific (one of the biggest toy companies in the world) has officially partnered with Kodansha to create a full Attack on Titan collectibles line: detailed action figures, plush toys, and tech accessories. This isn't cheap fast-fashion merch — JAKKS makes serious collector-quality stuff. With 140 million AOT manga copies sold worldwide, the franchise is getting the premium product treatment it deserves. Product reveals are coming.

And for Roblox players — Attack on Titan Revolution codes keep dropping! New codes were added as recently as March 18th with Spins, Emperor Keys, and boost potions up for grabs. Check Dexerto, PCGamesN, or the official AOTR Discord server (Announcements channel) RIGHT NOW because some codes only last 3-7 days. Don't miss free rewards! ⚔️🔥

sections.title: 🎮 Anime Gaming
sections.content:
🌟 BLUE PROTOCOL: STAR RESONANCE is currently running its first big anime crossover event — the Shangri-La Frontier collaboration — and it's absolutely incredible! If you don't know Shangri-La Frontier: it's the anime about a hardcore gamer who breaks terrible games for fun, then discovers an insanely deep hidden adventure inside a famously bad VR game. The crossover brings themed quests, exclusive gear, and character-inspired rewards, and it runs until April 22nd. Blue Protocol's gorgeous cel-shaded animation already makes you feel like you're literally inside an anime episode — this collab turns it all the way up. But here's the hype: TWO MORE mystery anime crossovers are confirmed for later this year, and nobody knows what they are yet. The community speculation is absolutely unhinged right now. Get in now!

🃏 Pokémon TCG dropped something spicy — Gem Pack volume 5 just announced ANIME CROSSOVER cards with fully illustrated alternative art, currently dropping in China first. These aren't regular cards. We're talking special full-art cards with anime characters in gorgeous illustrated designs. The global fan community is going absolutely crazy demanding a worldwide release. If Pokémon is smart, these won't stay China-exclusive for long. Fingers crossed!

🎮 Anime Overload on Roblox is also dropping fresh codes for March 2026 — grab them fast before they expire! The Roblox anime game scene is on fire right now between AOTR and Anime Overload both running active code drops.

🎯 Looking ahead to spring — with AnimeJapan happening this weekend, major gaming announcements tied to spring 2026 anime launches are expected. Attack on Titan has historically gotten game tie-ins with major franchise events. Watch the AnimeJapan stage shows closely — gaming crossover news often drops there alongside the anime reveals. Stay tuned! 🎮⚡

sections.title: 🎭 Cosplay & Events
sections.content:
🌸 IT'S ALMOST TIME — AnimeJapan 2026 is in FOUR DAYS (March 28-29, Tokyo Big Sight) and the world's biggest anime event is going to be absolutely MASSIVE. We're talking 120+ exhibitor booths, 200+ stage shows, and 500+ voice actors and staff guests packed into two legendary days. The cosplay scene at AnimeJapan is next level — Attack on Titan ODM gear, Survey Corps jackets, titan cosplayers so detailed they're terrifying up close. Fans worldwide stream the event live, and social media turns into a 48-hour waterfall of incredible content. Saturday morning is going to be electric. Don't miss it!

🌸 Meanwhile — Katsucon 2026 just happened and the cosplay galleries are INSANE! Kotaku's photographers (Mineralblu) captured some of the best looks from convention season's opening event. The level of craftsmanship this year is already setting a high bar — intricate handmade armor, screen-accurate props, lighting rigs built into costumes. 2026 cosplay is already a different tier.

🎌 Coming up FAST — Sakura-Con 2026 is April 3-5 in Seattle, Washington! The oldest and most respected anime convention in the Pacific Northwest, with 100,000+ square feet of programming, gaming tournaments, industry guests, concerts, AMV contests, and a legendary cosplay competition. Ten days away. If you're near Seattle, your costume planning window is closing FAST.

🦅 CyPhaCon runs April 10-12 in Lake Charles, Louisiana — voice actors, gaming tournaments, and one of the most welcoming cosplay competition communities anywhere. Perfect if you can't make the Seattle trip.

🇯🇵 Tokyo's spring 2026 event calendar has 20+ anime and manga events lined up — including dedicated cosplay photo meetups where cosplayers gather at scenic spots for organized community photo sessions. The Attack on Titan × Nijigen no Mori experience on Awaji Island is drawing incredible cosplay content from Japanese fans right now. The creativity is unreal! 🎭✨

sections.title: 📺 Anime News
sections.content:
📺 TOMORROW IS A BIG DAY — Oshi no Ko Season 3 wraps up TOMORROW (March 25th) with a special HOUR-LONG finale episode! This isn't just an ending — it's the launch of the '15-Year Lie' movie arc, the most emotional storyline in the entire series. One full hour of Oshi no Ko to close out Winter 2026. If you've been sleeping on this series, the idol industry murder mystery drama is genuinely unlike anything else in anime. Catch up before the finale drops!

🏴☠️ One Piece: Elbaph Arc is coming FAST — the show returns to Japanese TV on April 5th, and the global Netflix drop follows on April 11th. Elbaph — the legendary Island of Giants — has been teased and referenced since the very beginning of One Piece. Fans have been waiting for YEARS to finally see it animated. This arc is expected to be emotional, huge in scale, and absolutely packed with lore payoffs. April 11th goes on the calendar right now.

🌸 The Spring 2026 Anime Season is basically here — the premiere wave hits April 5-6 and it looks absolutely stacked. WIT Studio is launching 'Agents of the Four Seasons: Dance of Spring' on March 29th as a Spring teaser. The full Spring lineup includes major franchise returns and new heavy hitters dropping almost every single day of the first week of April.

🗡️ The 2026 anime year overall is already looking legendary — Oshi no Ko Season 3, Hell's Paradise Season 2, My Hero Academia: Vigilantes Season 2, Golden Kamuy's final arc, Detective Conan still going strong forever, and spring bringing a whole new wave on top. Re:Zero Season 4 is also confirmed for 2026. Between AnimeJapan this weekend (where new announcements are guaranteed) and the Spring season launching next week, the next 14 days might be the biggest fortnight in anime news all year. Buckle up! 📺🔥
